description_long: This oyster shell is an elongated, asymmetrical object with a rugged, layered exterior. Its surface displays a complex pattern of gray, white, and dark streaks, with pronounced concentric ridges running from the pointed tip to the broader base. The shell's texture is rough and uneven, with irregular bands and patches that give it a weathered, natural appearance. The edge of the shell is thick and jagged, with undulating contours and occasional chips or notches. The luster is predominantly matte, with only faint hints of a pearly sheen in some areas. The natural opening of the shell is off-center, running along one side and partially visible in the side views.
description: A rugged, elongated oyster shell with rough, layered ridges and a matte, gray-white surface marked by dark streaks and jagged edges.
description_view_0: The shell is seen from the side, highlighting its elongated, oval shape and the prominent, layered ridges running along its length.
description_view_1: Viewed from the narrow end, the shell appears more symmetrical, with the central ridge and the off-center opening faintly visible along one side.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the shell's curvature and the irregular, dark banding across its surface, as well as the thickness of the shell.
description_view_3: From the opposite narrow end, the jagged edge and the lateral alignment of the shell's opening are most apparent.
attribute_shell_pattern: The shell exhibits irregular, concentric striations and bands that alternate between gray, white, and dark brown. These patterns are dense and closely spaced near the pointed end, becoming broader and more diffuse toward the base. There are also scattered patches and streaks, with some areas showing mottled or speckled markings, contributing to a weathered, natural look.
attribute_shell_ridges: The shell features 6-8 prominent, irregular ridges that run roughly parallel to the shell's edge, with varying spacing and height. The ridges are more pronounced near the tip and become less distinct toward the base, giving the surface a rugged, undulating texture.
attribute_shell_opening_orientation: The natural opening is off-center, running along one side of the shell and aligned laterally. It is not centrally located, and its position is more visible in the side and end views.
attribute_shell_edge_contour: The outer edge of the shell is thick, jagged, and irregular, with a wavy contour and occasional notches or chips. The edge is not smooth, and its thickness varies along the perimeter, contributing to the shell's rugged appearance.
attribute_shell_luster: The shell's luster is predominantly matte and dull, with only faint, patchy hints of a pearly sheen in certain areas. The overall sheen is low and not uniform across the surface.
